source_ref.compose_env_source: existing external 211 runtime env file supplied through compose --env-file; values were not copied or printed
source_ref.deployment_note: runtime-only image rebased from the previous healthy image because dependencies did not change; compose used --no-build with the reviewed image tag

review_notes: This entry records a reviewed Auth/RBAC smoke summary for the b96d02e Foundation Alpha POC runtime.

The API and worker containers reported image ai-platform:b96d02e-release-evidence-runtime-acceptance with matching source revision, runtime subject, and OCI revision labels before the smoke was recorded.
The reviewed summary omits credentials, DSNs, object locators, executor-only internals, runtime workspace paths, user identifiers beyond synthetic smoke IDs, and personal workstation paths.

This evidence supports the Foundation Alpha POC security baseline only. It does not close production auth rollout, capacity, sandbox hardening, ordinary-user multi-agent, department rollout, alert export, packaged frontend image release acceptance, or signed Skill package/SBOM gates.
open_followups: Broader auth/session/RBAC/tenant/redaction regression remains required before production gate closure.
#21 recorded multi-tenant capacity/load evidence remains required before raising production concurrency defaults.
G7 Docker sandbox hardening and Docker-capable sandbox smoke remain blocked.
G8 ordinary-user multi-agent exposure remains feature-flagged/internal only.
G9 alert delivery and trace export 211 acceptance remain open.
Packaged frontend image smoke/release acceptance remains separate from this thin-shell POC smoke.
Signed package or SBOM review evidence for Skill release remains open.
